title: The Island Under Arlong’s Rule — Part 3
scene: On pages 9–12, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Cocoyasi Village and nearby towns show the cost of Arlong’s occupation.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's why the least I can do,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Is kill you with my own hands.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hahaha, don't make me laugh! I may not be the strongest guy out there, but there's no way I'd be weak enough to be killed by you!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh... looks like she's become quite the pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: It'd be best for your own safety,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: to not think of me as me anymore...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If I stayed here any longer, I would've been killed for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That bastard! He used a smoke bomb!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Surround the place! Don't let him escape!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I thought you might try some- thing like that.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: All I have to do now is escape by water!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: For the sake of my busi-ness,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now go to your grave quietly...!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
